criteria: Public, non-archived, non-fork repositories that carry a core BCI/neuro topic, or a context topic plus a neuro keyword. Ranked by recency (from the 6-hour snapshot slot) and stars. Categorisation and evidence tiers are heuristic.

methodology.note: Inclusion is not endorsement; AxonOS is not boosted.
